turn_info.content: Hi there, I really need someone to talk to right now.

results.term: My partner ran off with another woman and I simply...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My partner ran off with another woman and I simply cannot get over it. Why did he do this to me?

results.term: I know he could be at times and he did have a rovi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I know he could be at times and he did have a roving eye but I loved him and I miss him a huge amount, despite everything.

results.term: I think the biggest problem is that I keep wonderi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I think the biggest problem is that I keep wondering what his new girlfriend is like and if she is prettier or cleverer than me. I do not know what I did wrong.

results.term: That is a very sensible way to look at things .. I...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That is a very sensible way to look at things .. I do rationally realise that. Irrationally I just want him to come back to me and say that he made a mistake, though!

results.term: That's exactly it! I keep thinking of all the good...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That's exactly it! I keep thinking of all the good times we had together and the things that we did before her met Her. I just want those times to come around again even though I know they should not.

results.term: Thank you - you are really helping me to understan...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you - you are really helping me to understand how I am feeling. I think that perhaps the scar never goes away but yes, hopefully it will not hurt anymore one day

results.term: I do have some good friends but we also had some m...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I do have some good friends but we also had some mutual friends who have been a bit distant with me since the break up. I guess that I really don't need them though, huh?

results.term: That is good advice too. Or maybe I could do somet...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That is good advice too. Or maybe I could do something to help me make new friends? Do you have any suggestions?

results.term: I do love to read - I think that I will totally lo...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I do love to read - I think that I will totally look into joining a book club. I would really like to meet new people, not to date specifically but just to be friends.

results.term: Thank you so very much for having talked to me - I...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you so very much for having talked to me - I do feel a good deal more positive now. I know that there is a long way to go but I think that I can see the light now.
